title: Ability to add owners to automations/integrations
excerpt: More than one person should be allowed to “own” an automation or integration in case someone is OOO or has left the department or company. It would be best if additional owners could be set on automations and integration…

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: More than one person should be allowed to “own” an automation or integration in case someone is OOO or has left the department or company. It would be best if additional owners could be set on automations and integrations much like they can on boards and workspaces.

posts.author: Elfar (Rmen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I strongly support this feature request. It is nonsensical to depend on one single individual for an automation.
An ability to lock automations could easily prevent mistakes.

posts.author: Clayton_S (Clayton)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be awesome if we can get this feature. As our team continues to grow, it will get extremely hard for one person to do all the automations.
